subject: [PATCH v9 10/15] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch adds read-write protection (RWP) fault delivery to the userfaultfd interface and exposes UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP. It introduces a new RWP-protected PTE type, which triggers faults on access attempts. The patch also updates various kernel functions to handle RWP faults correctly and exposes the necessary API for userspace to interact with RWP protection. The changes work across anonymous, shmem, and hugetlb memory types and ensure that userspace never sees an advertised-but-broken feature when PROT_NONE is not available or VM_UFFD_RWP aliases VM_NONE on 32-bit systems.
